text: Email from Jim Palmer Starting Bid: $25,000 ASSET SNAPSHOT Property Type: Land Land Area: 1.82 AC VIEW AUCTION PAGE INVESTMENT HIGHLIGHTS 1.821-Acre Development Site: ±79,321 SF with flexible MRC zoning.
